name: BMI Federal Credit Union
description_short: BMI Federal Credit Union is a Central Ohio-based credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and mortgages to members. Voted Best Local Credit Union eight years in a row by Columbus Dispatch.
description_long: BMI Federal Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union serving the Central Ohio region, with a 90-year history of providing financial services to its membership. The organization operates as a member-owned cooperative, offering traditional banking and lending products through both physical branches and digital channels. As a credit union rather than a bank, BMI FCU operates on a non-profit basis, returning earnings to members through competitive rates and lower fees. The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including multiple checking account types (Free Checking, Platinum Checking, Youth Accounts, Starting Over Checking), savings products (regular savings, money market, certificates, IRAs, HSAs), and lending options (auto loans, mortgages, home equity lines, personal loans, credit cards, and debt consolidation loans). Their mortgage offerings include home purchase and refinancing options, while auto loans start as low as 5.040% APR. They provide both online and mobile banking platforms for account management and transaction processing, along with shared branch and ATM access through credit union networks. BMI FCU distinguishes itself through its community focus and educational commitment. The credit union operates an employer program offering financial services to employees at no cost to participating companies, positions itself as a "Preferred Employer," and provides extensive financial education resources including free workshops, financial coaching, and online learning options. The organization has earned local recognition, being voted Best Local Credit Union eight years in a row by Columbus Dispatch CBUS Top Picks Award. They also offer specialized programs like scholarships and partnerships with tax preparation services (TurboTax, H&R Block). As a credit union, BMI FCU's primary limitation is membership eligibility—not all consumers can join without meeting specific criteria (employment, residence, or family connections to existing members). While they offer competitive rates, some rates listed on their homepage (mortgages at 5.845% APR, credit cards at 9.900% APR) appear tied to specific terms and creditworthiness. Geographic service is concentrated in Central Ohio, making branch access limited for those outside the region, though online and mobile banking partially mitigate this constraint.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Voted Best Local Credit Union eight years in a row by Columbus Dispatch, indicating strong local reputation
Offers free financial workshops and financial coaching services to members
Competitive auto loan rates starting as low as 5.040% APR
Employer program provides financial services to employee groups at no cost to the company
Multiple checking account options including specialized "Starting Over Checking" for those rebuilding credit
Health Savings Accounts (HSAs) and youth accounts with financial education components
Mobile and online banking platform for convenient account management
cons: Membership eligibility restricted—not open to all consumers without meeting specific criteria
Geographic service limited primarily to Central Ohio region with fewer branch locations than national banks
Published rates appear promotional and require qualification; actual rates depend on creditworthiness and loan terms
Limited information on website about membership requirements or eligibility criteria
No indication of 24/7 customer service availability or extensive call center support
best_for: Central Ohio residents seeking a locally-focused financial institution with community involvement
Employees of companies with BMI FCU employer partnership programs
Consumers rebuilding credit who benefit from specialized checking accounts and financial coaching
Borrowers prioritizing competitive rates on auto loans and mortgages through a non-profit structure
diagnosis: BMI Federal Credit Union is best for Central Ohio residents and employees of partnered companies seeking competitive loan rates, financial education, and personalized service from a community-focused credit union. The primary caveat is membership eligibility—consumers must meet specific criteria to join, and service is geographically concentrated in Central Ohio, making it less accessible for those in other regions.
services: Starting Over Checking for credit rebuilding
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
